prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约21270→22773→19266→20492→24088，整体呈波动后移趋势，近3年累计后移约4800名；2025年基准位次约24088名，为近5年最低（数字最大）；该校在广东物理类招生计划2021–2023年均为23人，2024年增至33人，2025年38人；2026年计划48人，较2025年扩招约26%，竞争压力有所缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名近年波动，2021年第91→2022年第97→2023年第96→2024年第102→2025年第86→2026年第88，整体处于全国百强中游，近年排名有所回升；2025年高考周期内该校出现师德师风负面舆情（教师被指性骚扰），评价为偏负面；抖音热度总排名第90、评价为一般，短视频曝光量较低；未见明显投档断档记录；药学为A+（全国顶尖），中药学等相关学科实力突出，与招生专业中的药学类、中药学类、生物制药等高度对应，对目标明确的考生有较强吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 药学/制药类属生化环材大类，社会舆论整体呈明显劝退态势，但中国药科大学作为药学顶尖学府（A+），核心专业仍具独特吸引力；广东省2026年物理类考生约45.6万人，较2025年44万人增加约3.6%，竞争略有加剧，2021–2025年本科批线在432–445分之间波动，2025年为436分，整体平稳；该校位于江苏南京，非本省高校。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动后移趋势、2026年计划扩招约26%对位次的推低作用、广东物理类考生增加约3.6%对竞争的推高作用，以及学校排名回升和药学A+学科对考生的吸引力，考虑考生规模增加和学校排名上升带来的竞争加剧，预测2026年物理类最低位次约28091名，区间27591–28591名。

一档（最难进）

- 生物制药（拔尖创新班）
- 药学（杰出药学家实验班）。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 预测位次约28091名，区间27591–28591名。位次在区间内建议以二档药学类、生物制药为主力，一档拔尖创新班和实验班作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间下限（如27000名以内）可重点冲击一档王牌专业；位次接近区间上限（28500名以外）建议以三档保底，同时关注二档中位次相对靠后的中药学类、生物统计学等。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 21270 → 22773 → 19266 → 20492 → 24088, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 4800 positions in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 24088, the lowest (largest number) in the past 5 years; the university's enrollment plan in Guangdong for Physics Category was 23 students from 2021 to 2023, increased to 33 in 2024, and 38 in 2025; the plan for 2026 is 48 students, an expansion of about 26% compared to 2025, easing competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking fluctuated in recent years, from 91st in 2021 → 97th in 2022 → 96th in 2023 → 102nd in 2024 → 86th in 2025 → 88th in 2026, overall in the mid-range of the national top 100, with a recent recovery; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics (a teacher was accused of sexual harassment), rated as somewhat negative; its Douyin heat total ranking is 90th, rated as average, with low short video exposure; no obvious record of admission cut-off gaps; Pharmacy is A+ (top in the country), and related disciplines like Traditional Chinese Medicine are strong, highly corresponding to the admission majors such as Pharmacy, Traditional Chinese Medicine, and Biopharmaceuticals, which strongly attract targeted candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Pharmacy/Pharmaceutical majors fall under the broad category of Biology, Chemistry, Environment, and Materials, with overall public opinion showing a clear trend of discouragement, but as a top pharmacy institution (A+), China Pharmaceutical University's core majors still have unique appeal; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong is about 456,000, an increase of about 3.6% from 440,000 in 2025, slightly intensifying competition; the undergraduate batch line from 2021 to 2025 fluctuated between 432 and 445 points, with 436 points in 2025, overall stable; the university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local province university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating backward trend of historical rankings, the downward effect on rankings from the planned enrollment expansion of about 26% in 2026, the upward effect on competition from the increase of about 3.6% in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong, as well as the university's ranking recovery and the attraction of the A+ Pharmacy discipline to candidates, taking into account the intensified competition from the increase in candidate numbers and the rise in university ranking, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 28091, with a range of 27591–28591.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 28091, range 27591–28591. Candidates within the range are advised to focus on Tier 2 Pharmacy and Biopharmaceuticals as main choices, with Tier 1 Top Innovation Classes and Experimental Classes as reach options; candidates significantly above the lower bound of the range (e.g., within 27000) can aim for Tier 1 flagship majors; candidates near the upper bound of the range (outside 28500) are advised to use Tier 3 as safety options, while also considering relatively lower-ranked Tier 2 majors such as Traditional Chinese Medicine and Biostatistics.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category fluctuated from approximately 6207 to 5961 to 7065 to 6832 to 7197, showing an overall trend of shifting backward, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1200 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 7197; the university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangdong was 4 students each year from 2021 to 2025, and the 2026 plan is 9 students, a significant expansion of 125% compared to 2025, greatly alleviating competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; its Soft Science main ranking has fluctuated in recent years, ranking 88th in 2026, in the middle tier of the national top 100; during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, the university experienced negative public opinion regarding teacher ethics, rated as somewhat negative; Douyin popularity is average, with no obvious enrollment gaps; Pharmacy is rated A+ (top in the country), but the History Category majors are English (Pharmaceutical Direction) and Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction), which have low correlation with the core discipline of Pharmacy.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The English major has average social popularity and is in a wait-and-see state, while the Economic Management Experimental Class, as a broad economic management category, shows a divergent wait-and-see trend; in 2026, the number of History Category examinees in Guangdong is approximately 326,200, an increase of about 11.6% from 292,200 in 2025, significantly intensifying competition; from 2021 to 2025, the undergraduate batch line fluctuated between 428 and 464 points, with 464 points in 2025; the university is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, not a local university in this province.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical trend of ranking fluctuations and backward shifts, the significant lowering effect on rankings due to the 125% expansion in the 2026 plan, the upward pressure on competition from the approximately 11.6% increase in Guangdong History Category examinees, and the low correlation between the university's History Category majors and its core Pharmacy advantage, taking into account the intensified competition from the substantial increase in examinee numbers, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is approximately 12,645, with a range of 12,145 to 13,145.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- English (Pharmaceutical Direction)
- Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: History Category only offers two majors: English (Pharmaceutical Direction) and Economic Management Experimental Class (Pharmaceutical Direction), with a small enrollment (9 students in total in 2026). The predicted ranking is approximately 12,645, with a range of 12,145 to 13,145. The ranking gap between the two majors is not large; the English major has historically had a slightly better ranking than the Economic Management Experimental Class. It is recommended that candidates within the ranking range prioritize the English major, while those near the upper limit of the range may consider the Economic Management Experimental Class as a safe choice.
